name: tom_jerry_type
description: Classic cartoon chase music in the style of Tom & Jerry. Playful orchestral, mischievous strings, bouncy rhythm perfect for slapstick kitchen chaos.
trigger_hints: Play under dialogue-light physical comedy, sneaking, chase, and prop-gag sequences. Keep volume low so SFX and reactions remain readable.

sources.title: Tom & Jerry type
sources.author: makanghubert
sources.notes: AI-generated cartoon chase music. Duration ~1:54. Ideal for classic cat-and-mouse slapstick.
